# JSON-Table

> Free, local-first tools to read and work with JSON: view it as a collapsible tree, format/beautify/minify/validate it, convert arrays of objects into a sortable spreadsheet, and diff two documents. Everything runs in your browser — files never leave your machine.

JSON-Table is a browser-based developer utility. The workspace is a two-pane view: a tree navigator (with an optional source view) on the left and a nested or flat virtualized grid on the right, with global search, per-column filters, column reordering, and inline editing.

## Tools

- [JSON Viewer & Formatter](/json-viewer): Paste JSON to explore it as a collapsible, color-coded tree, or beautify, minify, and validate it with inline error locations.
- [JSON to Table](/json-to-table): Turn an array of objects into a sortable, filterable spreadsheet grid; keys become columns automatically, with inline editing.
- [JSON Diff](/json-diff): Compare two JSON documents and see exactly what was added, removed, or changed, by path.
- [Workspace](/workspace): The full interactive workspace — tree + virtualized grid, global search (⌘F), filters, column reordering, and inline cell editing.

## About

- Local-first: all parsing and rendering happen client-side; no uploads, no account.
- Free and open to use. Handles files up to 10 MB.
- [Home](/): Overview and quick entry point.
